title: Tenderly Crispy Middle Eastern Savoy Cabbage Labneh
description: A date-night Middle Eastern dish featuring savoy cabbage and labneh, with a perfect balance of umami and crispy textures. This raw-friendly dish is cooked to perfection in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot.
instructions: Preheat the ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, pomegranate molasses, sumac, salt, and black pepper.
Add the separated savoy cabbage leaves to the bowl and toss to coat with the dressing.
Add the cabbage mixture to the preheated pot and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the labneh cheese and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until heated through.
Transfer the cabbage mixture to a serving platter and top with chopped pistachios and parsley.
Garnish with pitted dates and serve immediately.
Serve with additional labneh cheese on the side, if desired.
Garnish with sumac and parsley for added color and flavor.
